title: thalictrum flavum subsp. mediterraneum
intro: Thalictrum flavum subsp. mediterraneum, also known as yellow meadow rue, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of yellow meadow rue include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Yellow meadow rue can be prepared as a herbal infusion or tincture, and has also been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
